html:
Exclusive to:  

A Boat Torch is a craftable Item in the Shipwrecked and Hamlet DLC. It is made with 2 Twigs and 1 Torch. It can be used to provide light on a Boat, other than the Log Raft and the Raft which have no slots for Boat Lights. Boat Torches must be attached to a boat and turned on to provide light. It can be turned off to preserve its fuel. It cannot be refueled, and will disappear when its fuel is consumed.

A better alternative to the Boat Torch is the Boat Lantern which has a durability of 7 min 48 sec.

Trivia

  • Crafting does not recognize an item's durability. Thus, using a torch with 1% durability works as well as a new one, and is a more efficient use of resources.

Gallery

  • An active Boat Torch during night.
Tools and WeaponsCraftable Items

Boat Torch
"See at sea."
×2 ×1
Tab
Tier
1 min 45 sec

Boat attachment.
Provides light at sea.
"boat_torch"
“This'll keep my hands free.”
–Wilson
“Strangely not for torching boats.”
–Willow
“Flame on boat is good idea!”
–Wolfgang
“How illuminating.”
–Wendy
“MARINE ILLUMINATION”
–WX-78
“To better observe the nocturnal sea life.”
–Wickerbottom
“I can go night fishing.”
–Woodie
“Sailing at night seems unsafe, but this makes it somewhat better.”
–Maxwell
“The fortunate angle of this stick makes for an ideal hanging device.”
–Wagstaff
“The night sea is alight!”
–Wigfrid
“It will light my way!”
–Webber
“Night-surfing. I love it!”
–Walani
“It's a light so I might "sea".”
–Warly
“Fer a torch on me boat, not fer torchin' me boat.”
–Woodlegs
“WHAT LIGHT!”
–Wilba
“For dark times on floater”
–Wormwood
“Open fire on a wooden boat. The most adventurous thing I've ever done.”
–Wheeler
A Boat Torch is a craftable Item in the Shipwrecked and Hamlet DLC. It is made with 2 Twigs and 1 Torch. It can be used to provide light on a Boat, other than the Log Raft and the Raft which have no slots for Boat Lights. Boat Torches must be attached to a boat and turned on to provide light. It can be turned off to preserve its fuel. It cannot be refueled, and will disappear when its fuel is consumed.
A better alternative to the Boat Torch is the Boat Lantern which has a durability of 7 min 48 sec.
Trivia[edit | edit source]
Crafting does not recognize an item's durability. Thus, using a torch with 1% durability works as well as a new one, and is a more efficient use of resources.

summaryViHtml:
Tóm tắt

Đuốc Thuyền là một Vật Phẩm có thể chế tạo được trong DLC ​​Shipwrecked và Hamlet. Nó được làm bằng 2 Cành Cây và 1 Đuốc. Nó có thể được sử dụng để cung cấp ánh sáng trên Thuyền, ngoại trừ Bè Gỗ và Bè không có chỗ cho Đèn Thuyền. Đuốc Thuyền phải được gắn vào thuyền và bật lên để cung cấp ánh sáng. Nó có thể được tắt để bảo quản nhiên liệu của nó. Nó không thể tiếp nhiên liệu và sẽ biến mất khi nhiên liệu cạn kiệt.

It is made with 2 [[Twigs]] and 1 [[Torch]]. It can be used to provide light on a [[Boats|Boat]], other than the [[Log Raft]] and the [[Raft]] which have no slots for Boat Lights. Boat Torches must be attached to a boat and turned on to provide light. It can be turned off to preserve its fuel. It cannot be refueled, and will disappear when its fuel is consumed. A better alternative to the Boat Torch is the [[Boat Lantern]] which has a durability of 7 min 48 sec. =={{Pic32|Placeholder}} Trivia== * Crafting does not recognize an item's durability.
